title: Dathomiri boar

'''Dathomiri boars''' were [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Swine|pig]]-[[Rodent/Legends|rodents]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]],<ref name="TOFF139" /> in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> A [[Color|brown]] and [[Tooth/Legends|tusked]] creature, they were 3 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall and lived in the [[Forest/Legends|forests]] and [[Jungle/Legends|jungles]] of the planet. They had long tails and claws tipped with [[Poison/Legends|poisonous]] [[Bacteria/Legends|bacteria]], which could [[Death/Legends|kill]] the carrion they [[Diet/Legends|ate]] with a slight scratch. After the first attack, Dathomiri boars would retreat to let the poison kill the prey.<ref name="TOFF139" />

In [[3638 BBY]],<ref name="TORDate">{{TOR_updates|2.0}}</ref> the [[Kaleesh/Legends|Kaleesh]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Shaedo]] ate Dathomiri boar meat, which he described as phenomenal, offering some to [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Varnus Orlec]].<ref name="RotHC">{{TORcite|type=general|The Legions Of Scum And Villainy|Darvannis}}</ref>

In [[31 BBY/Legends|31 BBY]],<ref name="Companion">''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]''</ref> [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] was tasked by the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] to investigate the disappearance of the planet [[Ova]]. Vos' search eventually led him to Dathomir where he came into contact with the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] [[Coven/Legends|coven]] of [[Witch/Legends|witches]].<ref name="SW23">[[Star Wars (1998) 23|''Star Wars'' (1998) 23]]</ref> While posing as a [[Slavery/Legends|slave]], Vos discovered the plans of Nightsister [[Ros Lai]], revealing himself as a Jedi. Lai attempted to feed Vos to some boars, but Vos slew the beasts with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].<ref name="SW24" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dathomiri boars first appeared in the [[Star Wars (1998) 24|twenty-fourth]] issue of [[Dark Horse Comics]]' [[Star Wars: Republic]] comic series as part of the [[Star Wars: Infinity's End|Infinity's End]] story arc.<ref name="SW24" /> It was published on [[November 22]], [[2000]],<ref name="Release Date">''[[Star Wars: The Comics Companion]]''</ref> and was written by [[Pat Mills]] and illustrated by [[Ramón F. Bachs]].<ref name="SW24" /> They were first identified in ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Rise of the Hutt Cartel]]'', the first digital expansion for the [[Star Wars video games|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'',<ref name="RotHC" /> released on [[April 14]], [[2013]].<ref name="RotHC release date">{{TORweb|url=info/news/news-article/20130325|text=Digital Expansion: Rise of the Hutt Cartel Launches April 14}}</ref>
